name: dropdown-menu
description: A keyboard-navigable floating action menu (WAI-ARIA APG menu-button pattern); positioned by @floating-ui/dom with flip + shift.
docs: Register <lv-dropdown-menu> by importing components/ui/dropdown-menu.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { key, label, icon?, disabled?, separator? }. Listen for `lv-select` to receive the activated item key.
